quality.rationale: 融合弗里德曼动力学与高温量子统计，逻辑链条清晰，且可直接迁移至其他相对论性粒子组分计算

origin.question: [文件 1: 1_s19_19.27.md]Problem 19.27. In a radiation dominated Friedmann cosmology at times near the big bang singularity, calculate the temperature $T$ as a function of (proper cosmological) time $t$ . Assume that only photons, electrons and positrons contribute to the energy density $\rho$ . How is the answer changed if neutrinos and antineutrinos are also allowed?## Solution
